query:
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as total_projects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sr.cnt > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_send_ready,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sr.cnt = 0 OR sr.cnt IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_send_ready
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT cp.projectId, COUNT(*) as cnt
  FROM contactProjects cp
  JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
  WHERE c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  GROUP BY cp.projectId
) sr ON sr.projectId = p.id
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm', 'cold')
GROUP BY p.priority
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm', 'cold');
